title: DF .1 Spray Blaster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''DF.1 Spray Blaster''' was made by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. Two of these weapons were part of the gun battery assigned to the command group of the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]].
